[ Headlines ]



1. 

How This 32-Year-Old Golf Pro, 

Trapped With an 80-Year-Old’s Swing,

Discovered An Unconventional “Technique” That

Added 35 Yards To His Drive And

Shaved 3 Strokes From His Best Score





Watch this free lesson right now to discover how thousands of middle-aged and older golfers are adding a minimum of 20 yards to their drive and lowering their handicap by 5 strokes… 



WITHOUT OVERHAULING THEIR SWING 



… plus having more fun than Bill Clinton, Bill Murray, and Billy Daly combined. 





2. 

Your buddies may laugh at your swing behind your back, but here’s… 



How To KEEP That Unconventional, 

Un-Coordinated, Awkward, 

Even UGLY Swing



Yet Drive the ball 32 yards farther… 



Using this unconventional technique that triggers the body’s untapped power source. It’ll leave you grinning from ear to ear and leave your buddies speechless.



3.



How This 93-Year-Old Kept 

His “Ugly Half Swing”  

Yet Added 32 Yards to His Drive Overnight and 

Regularly Embarrasses Men Half His Age







4. 



Forget the “Classic” Golf Swing

Now and Forever

Yet Add Up To 32 Yards to Every Drive And

Shave 5 Strokes Off Your Handicap



How to Master a controversial “technique” that syncs up with any and every swing, yet releases untapped power, accuracy and confidence - faster than you thought possible





5.



Never “Fix Your Swing” Again

Yet Add Up To 32 Yards to Your Drive

With This Unconventional Technique



How to Master an unconventional “hack” that syncs up with any swing, yet releases untapped power, accuracy and confidence - almost overnight





6.



Unconventional Swing Technique Lets You… 



Make Golf Fun Again



How to Master this unconventional golf technique that consistently adds up to 32 yards to your drive and helps you shave 5 strokes off your handicap. 



Get ready to release untapped power, accuracy, confidence, and FUN… 

In one lazy sunny afternoon.







7.



[ Free Training: Available for a Limited time ]



Controversial Golf Pro Instructs “Over the Hill” Golfers to:



“KEEP Your Ugly Swing”



Yet Add 32 Yards to Your Drive, 

Lower Your Handicap by 5, and

Leave Your Friends Speechless



In A Lazy Afternoon at The Range



How to easily master this unconventional “add-on” technique and release untapped power, accuracy, and confidence.





[ 1. Don’t change your swing. ]



If you’d like to add up to 32 yards to your drive… 



Don’t you DARE try and change your swing.



Especially if you’d also like to shave 5 strokes from your handicap… 



And become the envy of your regular foursome. 



I want you to do THIS instead.



Hi, I’m golf pro Eric Cogorno, and you heard me right. 



Don’t even think about overhauling your swing.



Especially if it’s unconventional, inconsistent, awkward, or even downright ugly.



And I want you to forget about ever trying to imitate the conventional “windmill swing” of touring pros. 



Instead, I want you to ADD this one simple, easy technique I’ll be teaching you today in this FREE golf training. 



Because when you do… 



It can help you hit your “dream drive” straight down the middle, 15, 20, even 30 yards farther than you are right now. 



And you can even add a beautiful baby draw.



You’ll giggle like a school boy as you magically erase strokes off your handicap, win more bets, and be “the man” on the 19th hole.



You’ll become the ringer on your team’s scramble.

Right now, this technique is helping THOUSANDS of middle age and senior golfers rediscover the FUN in golf.



Within the next 24 hours, you could join them.



Imagine consistently outdriving your foursome… 



Placing your ball with GPS like accuracy… 



Dropping your handicap score… 



And having more fun than ever… 



It’s all possible with the unconventional technique I’ll explain fully in just a minute.



And, once more, you do NOT need to overhaul your swing.



In fact, I FORBID it for my private students!



Take Billy, for example.



Billy is one of my star students.



And get this: Billy is 93. 

And he was ready to throw up his hands and quit because golf just wasn’t fun anymore.



His body just couldn’t could take trying to “swing like the pros.”



When I helped Billy add this one technique to his EXISTING swing…

In less than a half a bucket of balls, Billy added a consistent 32 yards to his drives and started embarrassing men half his age.



I understand this may seem like an over-the-top promise. 



I get it. I was skeptical too.



As a golf pro with tens of thousands of lessons under my belt, 13.4millions video views of my lessons, and being featured in Forbes magazine…  



I USED to think that “changing your swing” to imitate touring pros was the answer.



That is, until a brutal injury FORCED me into the body of an 70 year old.



After my injury, I realized I’d never be able to torque my body into that classic windmill swing like the touring pros.



Swinging like Tiger, Rory, or Brooks became an impossibility.



But, my injury FORCED me to find a way to swing around my limitations.



That’s when I discovered The “Closed Coil” technique.



When I added it to my now 70-year-old swing… 

I was amazed that I ended up hitting the ball longer and straighter -  by ignoring that conventional golf swing.



And I actually LOWERED my scores.



And now, after coaching thousands of “over the hill” golfers, we’ve found that trying to swing like the pros only ends in frustration, if not injury.



In fact, you shouldn't even try and force your body into that torque-crazy windmill swing.

Because you don’t have to.



Not when you learn how to use the “Closed Coil Technique” I’ll be revealing in this free training today.



This technique can actually sync to ANY GOLF swing and can help you add distance, lower scores, and most importantly - HAVE FUN again.



[ add testimonials ]



Now don’t be surprised if you’ve never heard about the “closed coil technique” before.



Like I mentioned, it’s unconventional.



And frankly, the big golf conglomerates don’t want this simple technique to get out.



They’d rather keep you on their merry go round chasing the latest and greatest shiny new toy… and collecting your money.



Why chase the “latest” breakthrough club when your scores never actually improve?



Why try and force the body into a swing that merely ends up in frustration?



Don’t join the 1 million golfers every year who put their clubs on Craigslist and give up the game because it’s not fun any more.



But, if you’re ready to learn

[ 2. Keep. Your. Swing. [ Don’t you dare try and change your swing.]



If you’d like help adding up to 15, 20, even 30 yards to your drive… 



And shave 5 strokes off your handicap…



I’m here to say you do NOT need to change your swing.



Hi I’m golf pro Eric Cogorno and you heard me right: I want you to KEEP your existing swing.



Even if it’s unconventional,  unbalanced, awkward, or even just plain ugly.



That’s because you can add on the one small, unconventional “tweak” that I’ll be teaching in this free golf lesson… 



And start slamming your drives dead center, adding an average of up to 25 yards to your drives. 



When you learn to use this little-known “add-on” technique, you can quickly and easily drop your handicap by 5 strokes.Who cares if you can’t emulate the conventional windmill swing of touring pros if the young bucks are all staring at you with admiration and jealousy?And who cares if your swing would never ever be featured on the cover of Golf Magazine if you become the “ringer” everyone wants on their team scramble?



If you’re skeptical that it’s possible, I get it.



As a golf pro, I used to think the same thing. 



In fact, up until a few years ago, I would have said it was impossible… 



… until a freak accident broke the entire left side of my body.



I thought my golf game was “over.”



But after much trial and error, I discovered a biomechanical technique that changed everything. 



I call it The “Closed Coil” Technique.



And it allowed me to keep my now-unconventional swing, yet ADD distance and lower my scores dramatically.



Plus, it made golf fun again.



I’ll tell you the entire brutal story in just a minute.



See, most of the guys I teach aren’t in their physical prime anymore.



They’re not 20… 30… or even 35.



They’re 42, 56, 63, or older.



Their joints are stiffer. They have knees, shoulders, or hips that have gone under the knife.



Their bodies simply can’t contort into the windmill swing like Tiger, Rory, or Justin Thomas.



Take one of my star students named Billy.



You wouldn’t know it from watching his drives, but Billy is 93.



He came to me ready to throw his clubs in a dumpster and quit the game.



Every round made him frustrated, and left his body feeling like he had one foot in the grave.



Then, I showed him the “Closed Coil” technique.



Without having to “change” his swing at all, Billy learned this simple “add-on” technique and added 32 yards to his drive in less than 35 minutes on the range.



Now, he’s destroying men half his age.



See, this is the big mistake most pros make.



They try teach a middle aged or senior golfer to swing like tour pros who are in their physical prime.



It just doesn’t work.



It’s like putting a square peg into a round hole.



And it frustrates the heck out of everyone.



In fact, 1 million golfers QUIT every single year - simply because it’s not fun anymore.



They’re tired chasing the ball left and right. 



They’re frustrated by always playing “spray and pray” golf.



They’re embarrassed to tee off on #1 at their local tournament or that charity fundraiser.



But what you’re about to learn can change all that.



What you’re about to learn will let you KEEP your swing… 

And yet hit the ball 20-30 yards farther, erase 5 shots from your handicap… 



All in a lazy summer afternoon.



Simply by adding on “The Closed Coil” technique to your swing.



Once I realized how every golf magazine and most golf pros were ignoring “over the hill golfers” and their limitations, I knew it was time to take action.



Since then, I’ve taught the “Closed Coil” technique to thousands of “over the hill” golfers.



And they’ve added an average of 25 yards to their drive and they’ve lowered their handicap an average of 5 strokes.



All without overhauling their swing.



In fact, they’re absolutely CRUSHING the ball, yet feeling more relaxed, limber, and pain free than ever.



[ add 3-4 testimonials ]



Now don’t be surprised if you’ve never heard about the “closed coil technique” before.



Like I mentioned, it’s unconventional.



And frankly, the big golf conglomerates don’t want this simple technique to get out.



They’d rather keep you on their merry go round, chasing the latest shiny new toy… and collecting your money.



Why chase the “latest” breakthrough club or training aid - when scores never actually improve?



Why try and force yourself  into a swing that merely ends up in frustration?



Like I said, my star student Billy, using his simple 20-year old clubs,  is beating men half his age sporting the latest thousand dollar set of clubs.



Don’t join the 1 million golfers every year who put their clubs on Craigslist and give up the game because it’s not fun any more.



Be the first of your golf buddies to learn The Closed Coil Technique.

[ 3. Learn the secret of 50+ golfers ]



A. 

“Like Stepping Back In Time”…



New Breakthrough Technique 

Doesn’t “Fix” Your Swing… 

 

It’s Just Adding an Average of 

25 Yards To My Students’ Drives





B. 

Attention: Golfers Over Age 40

The breakthrough technique revealed below 

is helping add up to 32 yards off the tee.



Thousands Of “Over The Hill” Golfers 

Are Using This Simple Biomechanical Technique

To Help Out-drive, Out-score, And Out-play 

Men Half Their Age.



In less than one sunny afternoon, you can too… 







Hi, I’m Golf Pro Eric Cogorno.



I want you to imagine stepping onto the golf course and outdriving your 30-year-old self… By up to 25 yards.



Which would then allow you to lower your handicap by up to 5 strokes.



Imagine playing your BEST golf as an “over the hill” golfer and putting those brash young bucks in their place.



It’s not a pipe dream, it’s the power of a newly uncovered biomechanical technique.



Ever wondered why some athletes perform at elite levels well past their “physical prime?”



Athletes like Tom Brady, Roger Federer, and Jack Nicklaus.



Their secret isn’t raw power or athleticism.



Their secret is to leverage the power of biomechanics.



Just ask Hale Irwin.



At 73 years old, he’s actually OUTDRIVING his 35-year-old self.



Not because he’s stronger, faster, or more flexible.



It’s because of the biomechanical technique you’ll learn about here today.



And get this: the breakthrough I’m talking about does NOT involve overhauling your existing swing.



In fact, I want you to keep your existing swing… 



Even if it’s unbalanced, inconsistent, or even downright ugly. 



I’ll tell you why in just a minute.



Neither is the breakthrough I’m talking about a new-fangled “training aid” or shiny new club.



They’ll just end up collecting dust in your garage.



What I’m talking about is a simple “add-on” technique that syncs up perfectly with any and every swing.



You see, it harnesses an untapped biomechanical power source within the body… 



And the results are explosive.



This little-known technique has worked for the touring pros like Hale Irwin.



And it’s worked for my students, almost all of them past their “physical prime.” 



It’s added an average of 25 yards to their drives.



In fact, one of my star students, Billy, added 32 yards to his drive in less than one lesson.



And Billy… is 93!



This technique has worked like a charm for golfers with a variety of limitation.



I’m talking about guys with knee and hip replacements. 



Guys with bum shoulders and bad backs.



I’m even talking about one-armed and one-legged golfers. [ show screen shot ]



I’ve even had a BLIND golfer write and tell me he’s in love with this technique! [ show screen shot ]



These are all guys who thought their “power days” were behind them… 



Guys who never dreamed they could hit the ball farther and lower their scores so quickly and easily.



All it took was learning how to tap into this little-known biomechanical power source.



See, every single golfer starts to LOSE power and yards once they hit their 30’s.



In fact, Golf Digest reported that for every 10 years of age, golfers lose almost that many yards off their swing.



For those 50 and up, that number can double.



Take those numbers across multiple clubs and it’s not surprising scores go up for middle age and senior golfers.



But the answer isn’t to overhaul your swing… And the answer isn’t a shiny new set of clubs.



The answer is a biomechanical technique called The “Closed Coil” technique.



And I never would have discovered it had I not suffered a brutal accident that crushed the entire left side of my body.



It completely destroyed my beautiful “windmill” golf swing.



I was a young man living in a 70 year old’s body.



I’ll tell you the brutal story in just a minute.



But my accident FORCED me to find a way to swing around my limitations.



Once I discovered the biomechanics behind The “Closed Coil” technique, golfers over 35 started flocking to my lessons asking how to learn it.



I made this video so I could make it available to as many middle age and senior golfers as possible.



But, there are many in the golf community who HATE me for sharing the information inside this free lesson today.



I don’t say that to be dramatic. It’s the flat-out truth.



And the reason why is because if you’re one of the MILLIONS of “over the hill” golfers whose body is starting to break down… 



And losing power and yards year after year… 



This breakthrough technique will allow you to forget about the “New Equipment” merry go round.



Which means it can save you thousands on private coaching, or thinking you just need a new set of clubs, or that new training aid.



This  means millions and millions of dollars in lost revenue for those big golf conglomerates. 



It’s clear why I’ve made a lot of enemies by sharing this simple technique.



And why, if you’re ready to not just add up to 25 yards to your drives, but lower your handicap by up to 5 strokes… 



It’s imperative you watch this lesson all the way through while it’s still available.

[ 4. Make Golf Fun Again ]



Golf is supposed to be fun, right?



But, when you spend half your time looking for your ball in the rough, or the neighboring fairway… 



When you’re worried to death about that water hazard, bunker, or slicing out of bounds… 



When your swing is as fickle as a pickle… 



Well, that gets old, doesn’t it?



And it’s why one million golfers every single year throw up their hands, dump their clubs on Craigslist and call it quits.



Hey, I’m golf pro Eric Cogorno, and today I’m going to show you how to Make Golf Fun Again.



I’m going to show you an unconventional technique that can add 15, 20, even 30 yards to your drive.



They’ll land dead center of the fairway, complete with a sweet little baby draw.



This technique can help you shave 5 strokes off your handicap, like you had a magic eraser.



It can make YOU the hero of your team scramble.



Turning your frustration into joy, for good.



And get this: what I’m about to show you will let you KEEP your existing swing.



You can forget all that pressure to rehab your swing into that of a touring pro.

Simply add this one small “tweak” to your existing swing, and you’ll gain up to 32 yards on your drive… 



You’ll experience accuracy you never knew you had… 



You’ll win more bets, and shut down that mouthy braggart at your local course.… 



What’s not fun about that?



You’ll be the envy of your regular foursome. They’ll be asking you for your “secret sauce.”



You’ll be the hero of your scramble. Playing “your drive” will become darn-near automatic.



And you’ll never get nervous or embarrassed when you step up to that crowded first tee - ever again.



It’s all because of this simple and easy to implement add-on technique.



Right now, it’s helping thousands of middle aged and senior golfers add distance, add accuracy, lower scores dramatically, and make golf fun again.



I would never have discovered it were it not for a brutal injury not long ago that crushed most of the left side of my body.



I became a young man - trapped in a 70 year old’s body.



You can imagine what it did to my golf swing.



I was ready to quit because I couldn’t swing like I used to, and honestly, the game stopped being fun.



I’ll tell you the crazy story in just minute.



Knowing I’d never ever have that picture-perfect conventional windmill golf swing forced me to find another way.



Eventually, I found a way to “swing around my limitations” with something I call the “Closed Coil Technique.”



And once I discovered I didn’t have to swing like tour pros to score like them, it was “game on.”



Soon, middle aged golfers, senior golfers, injured golfers, and golfers with significant physical limitations were flocking to my lessons.



They discovered how to keep their swing, even if it was unbalanced, awkward, uncoordinated, or even ugly.



Yet they were adding remarkable distance and accuracy to their golf shots.



And they were lowering their scores.



Which put great big ole smiles on their faces, because they started having fun on the golf course again.



And it’s exactly what I want to teach you here today.



Now, if you’re skeptical, I get it.



I was skeptical too.



After all, I’m a golf pro with thousands and thousands of lessons under my belt.



My instructional videos on YouTube have 13.4 million views.



I used to think swinging like a tour pro was the only way to card consistently lower scores.



But, I was wrong.



The “Closed Coil” technique goes contrary to what almost the entire golf world is pushing you to do.



The big golf conglomerates want everyone to try and “swing like the pros.” 



And when you don’t shoot consistently, they have a shiny new set of clubs or a new training aid to sell you.



Listen, if you’re over 40… 



If you’ve got some physical limitations… 



If you’re not as limber or strong as you used to be… 



Then you know it’s true: you’re the forgotten generation.



There’s zero instruction for golfers like us out there.



So, right now, I want you to forget - forever - trying to “fix your swing.”



In fact, I want you to keep it… 



But add this one little “Closed Coil” tweak.



I haven’t met a swing yet that it doesn’t “sync” up with perfectly.



You’ll surprise yourself by adding distance - 15, 20, 30 yards of it.



You’ll shock yourself by adding that beautiful “baby draw.”



You’ll even find yourself going down a club or two… 



And hitting your wedge into the green, instead of that 8 iron.



You’ll also find yourself erasing 5 strokes off your handicap… in no time at all.



All thanks to the “Closed Coil Technique.”



Don’t just take my word for it:



[ insert more testimonials - transition to body ]





[ 5. A technique so easy, it’s almost like cheating ]





Ever been tempted to “cheat” on the golf course?



You know, pull out your “toe wedge” to improve your lie... 



Call a “mulligan” on the 1st, 2nd, and 6th hole… 



Conveniently forget to add that penalty stroke out of the water.

Well, if you haven’t done those things, it’s safe to say just about everyone’s THOUGHT about it!



Hi, I’m golf pro Eric Cogorno and today I’m going to let you in on one of golf’s most closely guarded “underground” secrets.



It’s so powerful, you might even feel like you’re “cheating”... 



Because, almost overnight, your handicap can plummet by up to 5 strokes… like someone took a magic eraser to your score.

But it won’t be because you cheated.



It’s because you’ll be using the most effective score-lowering technique I’ve ever seen.



It’s called “The Closed Coil Technique.”



Right now, it’s helping thousands of middle aged and older golfers add distance, add accuracy, lower scores dramatically, and make golf fun again.



I would never have discovered it were it not for a brutal injury not long ago that crushed most of the left side of my body.



I became a young man - trapped in a 70 year old’s body.



You can imagine what it did to my golf swing.



I was ready to quit because I couldn’t swing like I used to, and honestly, the game stopped being fun.



I’ll tell you the crazy story in just minute.

Eventually, I found a way to “swing around my limitations” with the “Closed Coil Technique.”



And once I discovered I didn’t have to swing like tour pros to score like them, it was “game on.”



Soon, middle aged golfers, senior golfers, injured golfers, and golfers with significant physical limitations were flocking to my lessons.



They discovered how to keep their existing swing, even if it was unbalanced, awkward, uncoordinated, or even ugly.



Yet they were adding remarkable distance and accuracy to their golf shots.



And they lowering their scores.



Which put great big ole smiles on their faces, because they started having fun on the golf course again.



And it’s exactly what I want to teach you here today in this free golf lesson.



Now, if you’re skeptical, I get it.



I was skeptical too.



After all, I’m a golf pro with thousands and thousands of lessons under my belt.



My instructional videos on YouTube have 13.4 million views.



I used to think swinging like a tour pro was the only way to card consistently lower scores.



But, I was wrong.



The “Closed Coil” technique goes contrary to what almost the entire golf world is pushing you to do.



The big golf conglomerates want everyone to try and “swing like the pros.” 



And when your scores don’t improve, they have a new set of clubs or a new training aid to sell you.



Listen, if you’re over 40… 



If you’ve got some physical limitations or nagging injuries… 



If you’re not as limber or strong as you used to be… 



Then you know it’s true: you’re the forgotten generation.



There’s zero instruction out there for golfers like us.



So, right now, I want you to forget - forever - trying to “fix your swing.”



In fact, I want you to keep your swing… 



But add this one little “Closed Coil” tweak.



I haven’t met a swing yet that it doesn’t “synch” up with perfectly.



All it takes is about a half a bucket of balls to learn it.



Once you do, you’ll surprise yourself by adding distance - 15, 20, 30 yards of it.



You’ll shock yourself with consistent “baby draws” maybe for the first time in your life.



You’ll even find yourself going down a club or two… 



And hitting your wedge into the green, instead of that 8 iron.



You’ll also find yourself erasing 5 strokes off your handicap… in no time at all.



All thanks to the “Closed Coil Technique.”

[ 6. gentlemen’s bet = Billy beats the pants off you ]



Hey, I’m golf pro Eric Cogorno.



Can I interest you in a bet?



I’d like to bet you that one of my star pupils named Billy… 



Can beat the pants off you head to head.



But what might surprise you is that my star pupil isn’t some young buck ripping 350 yard drives.



Billy is a 93 year old self-described “hack” who was ready to throw his clubs in a dumpster and quit the game he loved.



He felt like his body was giving out on him.



He was spraying and praying… 



Chasing his ball all over the rough, hitting O.B., splash landing in the water hazard, and quite frankly, was also in a lot of pain after a round.



But now, I’m willing to bet ole Billy could kick your butt - outdrive you AND outscore you.



See, the first thing I did when Billy came to me was to tell him to STOP trying to “fix his swing.”



Instead, I told him to add just one small tweak to his already stiff “half-swing.”



Within hitting a half a bucket of balls, Billy had added a consistent 32 yards to his drive.



Plus, he had a beautiful “baby draw” to his shots, every single time.



He was giggling like a school girl!



Within a couple weeks, Billy shaved 5 strokes off his handicap and was embarrassing men half his age… 



All while swinging 20-year-old clubs.



Most importantly, Billy was having fun again.



You might wonder what I taught Billy that transformed him from a frustrated “hack”... 



To being darn-near a scratch golfer.



To someone you’d BEG to be in your scramble. 



It’s not a magic trick. 



It’s a simple tweak called the “Closed Coil” technique.



And once you learn how to add it to your swing, it’ll be an absolute game changer.



Golf WILL be fun again.



You’ll quickly and easily add 15, 20, 30 yards to your drive.



You’ll start hitting baby draws like clockwork.



Your handicap will be on a fast elevator down.



What’s more, you’ll be the envy of your golf buddies.



And those young bucks… 

Well, you’ll put the fear of God into them.



All because of the “Closed Coil” technique.



But, fair warning.



This is NOT what golf magazines and most golf pros will try and teach you.



In fact, it’s just the opposite.



Golf magazines exist to sell you the latest shiny object.

They want you to think that new shiny clubs or “breakthrough” training equipment will be the answer to your frustration and high scores.



Or, if you end up paying for lessons, golf pros will try and get you to “swing like the pros.”



But unless you’re in your 20’s or early 30’s, that’s just utter nonsense.



99% of the time, it does more harm than good.



Because if you have some physical limitations… 



If you’re not as limber or strong as you used to be… 



If you have some injuries you’re dealing with… 



The conventional windmill golf swing will actually make things WORSE.



Maybe even add to your list of injuries.



If you’re “over the hill,” then you already know you’re part of the “forgotten generation.”



Think about it - how many golf lessons have you heard about that are custom designed for middle aged and senior golfers?



NONE.



How would I know?



Well, a couple years ago I suffered a pretty brutal accident that basically crushed most of the left side of my body.



Even after I healed, I was living in the body of a 70 year old.



You can guess what that did to my golf swing - and my dreams.



Like Billy, I was ready to dump my clubs on Craigslist and find a different hobby.



That is until I was forced to discover something that would allow me to “swing around” my limitations… 



And yet hit the ball farther than ever… 



Not to mention carding lower scores AND, most importantly, having fun again.















Bullet Brainstorm



How to Step up to every single tee box, KNOWING you’re going to hit the drive that’s the envy of your entire foursome. 

How to swing “lighter” - yet add distance and accuracy to every swing.

How to make every swing feel relaxed, limber, and pain-free

How to put “big talkers” in their place as your ball lands 20, 30, 40 yards past theirs

How to win bets and beat the pants off all your friends, even if you’re using 20 year old equipment.

How to have the confidence you’ll hear, see, and feel that satisfying “smack” every swing knowing you’ve hit it as square as any touring pro

How to generate 5x more power by swinging “lighter”

How to set your laser finder to your drive

How to own the #1 Tee Box on Tournament Day

How to split the fairway in half like you had a laser finder - down to a quarter of an inch
